name: Web Search
description: Multi-source web search with automatic failover. Tries free, keyless sources first (DuckDuckGo, public SearXNG) and falls through on rate-limit / exhausted quota / error; upgrades to Brave or Tavily when their keys are present; Wikipedia is the always-on floor.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web across multiple sources with automatic failover. Returns titles + URLs + snippets.
